allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\('./src/db'\); db.initDb\(\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('DB init OK'\); const themes = db.themeQueries.list\('test'\); console.log\('list:', themes\); const t = db.themeQueries.create\('test-loc', 'My Theme', { colors: { primary: '#FF0000' } }\); console.log\('created:', t.id, t.name, t.config.colors.primary, t.config.colors.background\); const dup = db.themeQueries.duplicate\(t.id, 'Dup Theme'\); console.log\('duplicated:', dup.id, dup.name\); const a = db.assignmentQueries.assign\('test-loc', t.id, 'cal-123', 'Test Cal'\); console.log\('assigned:', a.calendar_id, a.theme_id\); const byCalendar = db.themeQueries.getByCalendar\('cal-123'\); console.log\('byCalendar:', byCalendar.name\); db.themeQueries.delete\(t.id\); db.themeQueries.delete\(dup.id\); console.log\('cleanup done'\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\)")
